name: How to Build a Planet
overview: The series uses stunning interactive CGI to reveal step-by-step how a world is put together. With a little help from the world's top scientists and engineers, Hammond will build the Earth and Solar System piece by piece.

trailers.title: The Laws of Gravity - Richard Hammond Builds a Planet: Preview - BBC One
The oldest thing on the earth? - Richard Hammond Builds a Planet: Preview - BBC One
